title: gladiolus grandiflorus
intro: Gladiolus grandiflorus, also known as the wild gladiolus or sword lily, is a perennial plant that belongs to the iris family and is native to North America. Traditionally, the roots of this plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as wounds, fever, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Gladiolus grandiflorus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Gladiolus grandiflorus is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its roots can be dried and used in teas or capsules for its medicinal properties.
